summary: Iteration 58 - Testing Push Notifications and Retry Mechanism features. Backend: 27/27 tests passed (100%). All notification API endpoints working correctly. Retry mechanism fully implemented for text-to-image, text-to-video, reel generation, and story generation. ISSUE FOUND: image-to-video and video-remix functions are MISSING retry logic.

critical.issue: Missing retry logic - function does not have automatic retry mechanism unlike text-to-video
Missing retry logic - function does not have automatic retry mechanism unlike text-to-video

minor.issue: SendGrid sender identity not verified - emails fail with 'from address does not match verified Sender Identity' error
minor.note: Third-party configuration issue, not code bug

types_verified: security_threat - critical severity, all channels (push, email, sms)

retry_mechanism.text_to_image: IMPLEMENTED - 3 retries with exponential backoff, content policy not retried
retry_mechanism.text_to_video: IMPLEMENTED - 3 retries with exponential backoff, content policy not retried
retry_mechanism.story_generation: IMPLEMENTED - 3 retries for content + 3 retries for images

verified: Admin users can access all notification endpoints

action_items: Add retry logic to process_image_to_video function (genstudio.py lines 498-559) - should match process_text_to_video pattern
Add retry logic to process_video_remix function (genstudio.py lines 660-709) - should match process_text_to_video pattern
Optionally: Verify SendGrid sender identity for email notifications to work
critical_code_review_comments: Push notification system is well implemented with proper channel support (push, email, sms)
Retry mechanism has smart error categorization - network errors get more retries, content policy violations are not retried
notify_generation_failure integration is present in text-to-image and text-to-video
MISSING: image-to-video and video-remix do not have retry logic despite documentation stating 'all generation outputs' should have it
Quiet hours feature is implemented for notifications
context_for_next_testing_agent: Push notifications API fully working. Retry mechanism implemented for text-to-image, text-to-video, reel, and story generation. CRITICAL: image-to-video and video-remix functions in genstudio.py are MISSING retry logic and need to be fixed. The retry pattern from process_text_to_video (lines 354-429) should be applied to these functions.

rca_of_the_issue.issue: image-to-video and video-remix missing retry logic
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: These functions were likely not updated when retry mechanism was added to text-to-video
rca_of_the_issue.evidence: process_text_to_video has 'while attempt <= max_retries' loop with exponential backoff, but process_image_to_video and process_video_remix only have try-except without retry
rca_of_the_issue.reproduction: Review genstudio.py - compare process_text_to_video (lines 354-429) with process_image_to_video (lines 498-559) and process_video_remix (lines 660-709)
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Copy the retry pattern from process_text_to_video to both missing functions
